---
title: "Daho Wealth"
subtitle: "Financial & Economic Intelligence Platform"
author: "Jean-Paul (JP) Sossavi"

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    css: styles.css
---
<div style="
padding: 50px;
border-radius: 18px;
background:
linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(37,99,235,0.18), rgba(14,165,233,0.12));
border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
margin-bottom: 40px;
">

<h1 style="font-size: 3.4rem; margin-bottom: 10px;">
Daho Wealth
</h1>

<p style="
font-size: 1.35rem;
max-width: 850px;
color: #cbd5e1;
">
Financial markets, economic intelligence, and data-driven insights for Africa and global markets.
</p>

<div style="margin-top:30px;">
<a href="http://32.192.35.243:8000/market"
target="_blank"
class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">
📊 Open Live Market Dashboard
</a>
</div>

</div>


## Financial & Economic Intelligence for Africa and Global Markets

Daho Wealth helps investors, students, entrepreneurs, researchers, and the African diaspora understand markets, analyze companies, track economic trends, and build long-term wealth.

---

<div class="glass-card">

## What We Are Building

- 📊 Live stock market dashboards
- 🌍 African economic intelligence
- 📈 Financial research and valuation
- 🧮 Investment education tools
- 🚀 Data-driven insights for emerging markets

</div>

---

<div class="glass-card">

## Platform Focus

Daho Wealth combines financial market data, macroeconomic indicators, stock research, and practical tools into one accessible intelligence platform.

</div>

<div class="site-footer">
  <p>
    © 2026 Daho Wealth • Financial & Economic Intelligence Platform
  </p>

  <p>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jpsossavi/" target="_blank">
      LinkedIn
    </a>

    •

    <a href="https://www.facebook.com/p/Daho-Wealth-61575871481173/" target="_blank">
      Facebook
    </a>
  </p>
</div>
